name: @tekmidian/pai
description: Personal AI Infrastructure — persistent memory and session continuity
author: Matthias Nott

mcp.name: pai
mcp.description: PAI Knowledge OS — federated memory search, project registry, session management

tools.name: memory_search
tools.description: Search indexed memory across projects (keyword, semantic, or hybrid mode)

tools.name: memory_get
tools.description: Retrieve full content of a specific file from project memory

tools.name: project_info
tools.description: Look up a project by slug, alias, or number

tools.name: session_list
tools.description: List session notes, optionally filtered by project

tools.name: project_detect
tools.description: Identify which project a given path belongs to

tools.name: project_health
tools.description: Audit all registered paths for moved or deleted directories

tools.name: project_todo
tools.description: Read a project's TODO.md and continuation prompt

notes: Cursor supports MCP servers but not Claude Code hooks or skills. PAI memory search, project registry, and all 9 MCP tools work. Hooks (session lifecycle, observability) and skills (slash commands) require Claude Code.
